xipsoftFark.title: Why Choose XipSoft?
xipsoftFark.subtitle: 15+ years of engineering expertise spanning cybersecurity to embedded systems.
xipsoftFark.experienceDesc: Deep technical expertise spanning cybersecurity to embedded systems. Every line of code is written with real-world project experience behind it.
xipsoftFark.guaranteeDesc: Every line of code is written to XipSoft quality standards. Unit testing, load testing and security audits are part of our standard process.
xipsoftFark.directCommDesc: You talk to the engineers building your project, not sales reps. Fast decisions, zero bureaucratic delays.
xipsoftFark.sourceFilesDesc: All assets, dependencies and configuration files are 100% yours. No vendor lock-in, ever.
xipsoftFark.identityDesc: When your project goes live, our work doesn't end — the real journey begins. We're with you through CI/CD, maintenance and scaling.

services.title: End-to-End Technical Expertise
services.subtitle: Scalable, sustainable software architectures for every platform and need.
services.webDesc: Next.js/React solutions targeting top-tier Core Web Vitals. SSR/SSg optimization, Edge Runtime, database sharding and high-traffic e-commerce infrastructure.
services.mobileDesc: Native performance from a single codebase with Flutter/React Native. Offline-first architectures, SSL Pinning and in-app monitoring with Sentry/Firebase.
services.desktopDesc: Powerful desktop apps built with Electron, Qt and C++. Low-level system access, hardware integrations and Windows/macOS/Linux cross-platform compatibility.
services.securityDesc: OWASP Top 10 audits via Blackbox and Whitebox testing. API security, Docker container isolation and 24/7 SIEM monitoring.
services.seoDesc: Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals optimization, google Ads and conversion-focused content strategy for organic growth.
services.customDesc: ERP and CRM solutions built with microservice architecture. Event-driven designs, RabbitMQ/Kafka messaging, scalable PostgreSQL/NoSQL structures.

profileEditor.emptyPreview: Start typing to see your profile preview...

howTo.label: getting Started
howTo.title: How to Add Your Profile
howTo.subtitle: Follow these {count} steps to add your developer profile to the XipSoft community platform.
howTo.step1Desc: go to the XipSoft gitHub repository and click the "Fork" button to create your own copy.
howTo.step2Desc: Clone the forked repository to your local machine using git.
howTo.step3Desc: Navigate to the project directory and install dependencies using Bun.
howTo.step4Desc: Create a new branch using your name. This keeps your changes separate from the main branch.
howTo.step5Desc: Run the development server to see your changes in real time.
howTo.step6Desc: Visit localhost:3000 in your browser to see the site running locally.
howTo.step7Desc: You have two options: use the visual Profile Editor or manually create an MDX file.
howTo.step8Desc: Navigate to the profiles page. Your card should appear. Use the search bar if there are many profiles.
howTo.ctaJoinSuffix: XipSoft software engineers on the platform.
howTo.step8Line1: Your profile card appears in the grid!
howTo.step8Line2: Search by typing your name if needed.
howTo.step9Desc: Stage your profile file and use the interactive gitmoji commit helper to create a well-formatted commit.
howTo.step10Desc: Push your branch to your forked repository on gitHub.
howTo.step11Desc: go to the original XipSoft repository on gitHub and create a pull request from your branch.

devSetup.label: Development Setup
devSetup.title: Firebase Setup guide
devSetup.subtitle: Follow these {count} steps to set up Firebase for local development. Beginner-friendly — no prior experience needed.
devSetup.step1Desc: Firebase is a google product, so you need a google account. If you already have a gmail account, skip this step.
devSetup.step1Line2: Fill in your name and create a username
devSetup.step1Line3: Set a password and verify your phone
devSetup.step1Line4: Done! You now have a google account
devSetup.step2Desc: go to the Firebase Console and create a new project for your development environment.
devSetup.step3Desc: Inside your Firebase project, register a web application to get your credentials.
devSetup.step3Line1: On Project Overview, click the Web icon
devSetup.step4Desc: After registering, Firebase shows your config values. Copy them — you'll need these for your .env.local file.
devSetup.step4Tip: You can find these anytime at: Project Settings → general → Your apps
devSetup.step5Desc: Set up google sign-in so users can log in to the platform.
devSetup.step5Line4: Set your project name and support email
devSetup.step6Desc: Firestore stores blog posts, job listings, and user data.
devSetup.step7Desc: Storage handles image uploads for blog cover photos and user avatars.
devSetup.step8Desc: Clone the XipSoft repository and install dependencies using Bun. If you already have the code cloned, just run bun install and skip to the next step.
devSetup.step9Desc: Create your .env.local file and paste the Firebase config values from Step 4.
devSetup.step9Line2: # Then edit .env.local with your Firebase values:
devSetup.step10Desc: Start the development server and open the app in your browser.
devSetup.ctaDesc: You're all set to develop locally with Firebase. Sign in with google, create blog posts, and test job listings.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Learn how XipSoft collects, uses, and protects your personal data in compliance with gDPR and privacy regulations.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: XipSoft ('we', 'our', or 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services. Please read this privacy policy carefully. By using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

information.title: 2. Information We Collect
information.intro: We collect information that you provide directly to us and information collected automatically:

items.personal: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, and other contact details you provide
items.technical: Technical Data: IP address, browser type, device information, operating system, and browsing patterns
items.usage: Usage Data: Pages visited, time spent on site, clicks, and navigation patterns
items.cookies: Cookies and Tracking: Information collected through cookies, pixels, and similar technologies
items.advertising: Advertising Data: Information shared by google AdSense and advertising partners for targeted advertising

usage.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
usage.intro: We use the information we collect to:

items.provide: Provide, operate, and maintain our website and services
items.improve: Improve, personalize, and expand our website experience
items.personalize: Personalize content and display relevant advertisements through google AdSense
items.communicate: Communicate with you regarding updates, support, and marketing (with your consent)
items.advertising: Serve personalized ads and measure advertising effectiveness via google AdSense
items.security: Detect, prevent, and address technical or security issues

adsense.title: 4. google AdSense & Advertising
adsense.content: We use google AdSense, a third-party advertising service provided by google LLC, to display advertisements on our website. google AdSense uses cookies and web beacons to collect information about your visits to this and other websites to provide relevant advertisements. This information includes your IP address, browser type, pages viewed, and clickstream data. google may use this data to personalize ads across the websites it partners with.
adsense.optout: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting google Ads Settings (https://adssettings.google.com) or by visiting www.aboutads.info. You can also manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

sharing.title: 5. Information Sharing & Disclosure
sharing.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with:

items.service: Service Providers: Third-party companies that perform services on our behalf (hosting, analytics, advertising)
items.advertising: Advertising Partners: google AdSense and other ad networks to serve relevant advertisements
items.analytics: Analytics Providers: google Analytics and similar services to understand website usage
items.legal: Legal Requirements: When required by law, regulation, or legal process

cookies.title: 6. Cookies & Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our website and improve our services. google AdSense uses DoubleClick cookies to serve more relevant ads across the web and limit the number of times you see an ad.
cookies.manage: You can control cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling cookies may affect your ability to use certain features of our website and the relevance of advertisements displayed.

security.title: 7. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

rights.title: 8. Your Privacy Rights
rights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

items.access: Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
items.correct: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
items.delete: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data under certain circumstances
items.object: Objection: Object to processing of your personal data for certain purposes including advertising
items.portable: Portability: Request transfer of your data to another service provider
items.withdraw: Withdraw Consent: Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent

children.title: 9. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our services are not intended for individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have inadvertently collected personal data from children, we will take steps to delete such information.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last Updated' date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms and conditions governing your use of XipSoft's website, services, and community platform.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using XipSoft's website, services, or community platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.

items.web: Web software development and design services
items.mobile: Mobile application development for iOS, Android, and cross-platform
items.desktop: Desktop software development for Windows, macOS, and Linux
items.consulting: Technology consulting, cybersecurity, and SEO services
items.community: Community , developer profiles, blog platform, and job board

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.intro: When you create an account with us, you agree to:

items.accurate: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
items.secure: Maintain the security and confidentiality of your login credentials
items.responsible: Accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account
items.notify: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account

intellectual.title: 4. Intellectual Property Rights
intellectual.content: The website, its original content, features, functionality, software, and design are and will remain the exclusive property of XipSoft. The content is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws. Our trademarks and trade dress may not be used in connection with any product or service without prior written consent.

userContent.title: 5. User-generated Content
userContent.intro: You are responsible for content you post on our platform. By posting content, you confirm that it does not:

items.illegal: Violate any applicable law, regulation, or third-party rights
items.harmful: Contain harmful, offensive, or inappropriate material
items.infringing: Infringe on intellectual property rights of others
items.spam: Constitute spam, advertising, or promotional material without authorization

prohibited.title: 6. Prohibited Activities
prohibited.intro: You agree not to engage in any of the following activities:

items.violate: Violate any applicable local, state, national, or international law
items.exploit: Exploit, harm, or attempt to exploit or harm minors in any way
items.interfere: Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the website
items.unauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any portion of the website or any other systems or networks
items.scrape: Use any robot, spider, scraper, or other automated means to access the website

disclaimer.title: 7. Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: The website and its content are provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied. XipSoft does not warrant that the website will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free, or that defects will be corrected.

limitation.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: In no event shall XipSoft, its directors, employees, or agents be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the website or services.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to our services immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the website and services will immediately cease.

governing.title: 10. governing Law
governing.content: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with applicable laws, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights.

changes.title: 11. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.

contact.title: 12. Contact Information
contact.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: Learn about how XipSoft uses cookies and tracking technologies, including google AdSense advertising cookies.

what.title: 1. What Are Cookies
what.content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the website remember your preferences, understand how you use the site, and improve your experience. Cookies can be 'persistent' (remaining on your device for a set period) or 'session' cookies (deleted when you close your browser).

types.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
types.intro: We use the following types of cookies:

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.content: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility. You cannot opt out of these cookies.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.content: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. We use google Analytics to analyze website usage and improve our services.

advertising.title: Advertising Cookies
advertising.content: These cookies are used to deliver relevant advertisements and measure advertising effectiveness. We use google AdSense, which uses DoubleClick cookies to serve more relevant ads across the web and limit ad frequency.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.content: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization, such as remembering your language preferences, theme settings, and login status.

adsense.title: 3. google AdSense Cookies
adsense.content: We use google AdSense to display advertisements on our website. google AdSense uses cookies to help serve ads based on users' prior visits to our website and other websites on the Internet.
adsense.details: google's use of the DoubleClick cookie enables it and its partners to serve ads to our users based on their visit to our site and/or other sites on the Internet. Users may opt out of the use of the DoubleClick cookie for interest-based advertising by visiting Ads Settings (https://adssettings.google.com).

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.intro: In addition to our own cookies, we may also use various third-party cookies to report usage statistics, deliver advertisements, and so on. These include:

items.google: google AdSense and google Analytics for advertising and website analytics
items.analytics: Analytics providers to understand user behavior and improve our services
items.social: Social media platforms for sharing functionality (if you choose to share content)
items.advertising: Advertising networks that help us serve relevant ads

manage.title: 5. Managing Cookies
manage.content: You have the right to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie preferences by modifying your browser settings to refuse cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.
manage.browser: Most web browsers allow some control of most cookies through the browser settings. To find out more about cookies, including how to see what cookies have been set, visit www.aboutcookies.org or www.allaboutcookies.org.

browsers.chrome: google Chrome: Settings → Privacy and Security → Cookies
browsers.firefox: Mozilla Firefox: Options → Privacy & Security → Cookies
browsers.edge: Microsoft Edge: Settings → Cookies and Site Permissions

consent.title: 6. Consent & Cookie Banner
consent.content: When you first visit our website, we will ask for your consent to set non-essential cookies. You can give or withdraw your consent at any time. Withdrawing consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.

updates.title: 7. Updates to This Policy
updates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, regulation, or our business practices. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us:

consent.title: Cookie & Advertising Consent
consent.description: We use cookies and google AdSense to personalize content and ads, provide social media features, and analyze our traffic. Click 'Accept' to consent to the use of all cookies, or 'Decline' to use only essential cookies.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for site functionality and optional cookies for analytics and personalized advertising through google AdSense.

data.title: Data Collection
data.content: google AdSense may collect your IP address, browser type, pages visited, and browsing behavior to serve relevant advertisements.

control.title: Your Control
control.content: You can change your cookie preferences at any time. Visit our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy for more information.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for may have been deleted, renamed, or is temporarily unavailable.
